message:
fix(reactor): correct module doc table references and tighten compliance tests

Two doc-comment tables referenced stale module filenames (linux.rs and
macos.rs) instead of the actual files (epoll.rs and kqueue.rs).  Updated
both tables to match the real module structure.

Also strengthened the compliance test helpers for deregister and modify
of unknown tokens: after asserting the operation fails, now additionally
asserts the error kind is `io::ErrorKind::NotFound`, ensuring all reactor
backends report the same error variant for missing registrations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
